title: Quality Measurement Results
description: Schema for the output of quality measurements. Contains perceptual quality metrics (SSIMULACRA2, Butteraugli, PSNR, SSIM) for each encoded image measured against its original reference.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI or relative path used to validate this file

study_id.description: Identifier of the study these measurements belong to

dataset.description: Information about the source dataset used

path.description: Path to the dataset directory (relative to project root)

image_count.description: Number of images used from the dataset

encoding_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp from the encoding stage. Null when encoding and measurement run in the same merged pipeline pass.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the quality measurements were completed

tool_versions.description: Versions of encoding and measurement tools used in this study. Keys are tool names (e.g., 'cjpeg', 'ssimulacra2'), values are version strings or 'available' if version could not be determined.

measurements.description: List of all quality measurement records

source_image.description: Path to the source image used for encoding (relative to project root)

original_image.description: Path to the original dataset image used as quality reference (relative to project root)

encoded_path.description: Path to the encoded output file (relative to project root)

chroma_subsampling.description: Chroma subsampling mode used, if applicable. Null for formats that do not support chroma subsampling selection.

speed.description: Speed setting for AVIF encoder (0-10, lower is slower/better), if applicable

effort.description: Effort setting for JPEG XL encoder (1-10, higher is slower/better), if applicable

method.description: Compression method for WebP encoder (0-6, higher is slower/better), if applicable

resolution.description: Target resolution (longest edge in pixels) if preprocessing was applied. Null when no resolution constraint was used.

crop.description: Target crop size (longest edge in pixels) if crop preprocessing was applied. Null when no cropping was used.

analysis_fragment.description: Coordinates of the analysis fragment in the original image coordinate space. Quality metrics are measured only on this region. Null when crop-impact mode is not used.

crop_region.description: Coordinates of the crop window applied to the original image. Defines the region that was extracted before encoding. Null when no cropping was used.

width.description: Width of the encoded image in pixels

height.description: Height of the encoded image in pixels

source_file_size.description: File size of the source image in bytes

encoding_time.description: Wall-clock time in seconds taken to encode this image

file_size.description: File size of the encoded image in bytes

ssimulacra2.description: SSIMULACRA2 score (higher is better, ~100 = lossless, <30 = poor, 70-90 = good, >90 = excellent)

psnr.description: Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio in dB (higher is better, >40dB = excellent, 30-40dB = good)

ssim.description: Structural Similarity Index (0-1, higher is better, >0.95 = excellent)

butteraugli.description: Butteraugli perceptual distance (lower is better, <1.0 = excellent, <1.5 = good, >3.0 = poor)

measurement_error.description: Error message if any measurements failed

extra_args.description: Any encoder-specific extra arguments that were used. Null when no extra arguments were provided.
